title: Use Team list in Dropdown
excerpt: Hello! I was asked to submit this here, as this functionality does not currently exist - but it should in my opinion.  Is there a way to add a Team to a Dropdown column and have the members listed individually as the ava…

posts.author: flowinbowen (Matt Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I was asked to submit this here, as this functionality does not currently exist - but it should in my opinion. Is there a way to add a Team to a Dropdown column and have the members listed individually as the available selections? The members of this Team come and go, so if the column is referencing a Team then the selections would update dynamically based on the current Team members. At least that’s what I’m hoping would happen.

Original Post
